_comment: Regression baselines for the Maelardalen (MRTC) WCET benchmark suite on MSP430.
Consumed by tests/regression_test.py. Each benchmark is BUILT and RUN through llta
(loop bounds come from the Clang LoopBoundPlugin via the #pragma loop_bound(...)
annotations in tests/srcMaelardalen/*.c). The recorded outcome is the contract:
expected: <int>  -> analysis produced this WCET; must reproduce exactly.
expected: null   -> a valid run that produces NO WCET (build-fail / crash /
analyze-fail). 'status'+'note' document why. A crash is a
valid test run: re-running must still produce no WCET (GREEN).
Refresh a value here when it legitimately changes; flip null<->int when behaviour
changes. status vocabulary: build-fail | crash | analyze-fail | unsound.

bsort100.note: Uses the source #pragma loop_bound values (100,99,99) now that JSON is preferred over the looser SCEV maxBTC. Sound: the body-less integer __mspabi_* helpers it calls are now costed from measured bounds (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 327472 when those were costed 0.

cnt.note: Sound: body-less __mspabi_mpyi/remi are now costed from measured bounds (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 6347 (UNSOUND) when costed 0.

ns.note: Sound: body-less integer __mspabi_* helpers now costed from measured bounds (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 8632 when costed 0.

adpcm.note: Upstream LLVM MSP430 backend bug (not LLTA): opt rewrites my_sin's +/-2*PI range-reduction into llvm.smax.i16(x,-6282); MSP430 EmitCMP/LowerSELECT_CC does getConstant(C->getSExtValue()+1) = -6281 = 0xFFFF...E757, which LLVM 20's strict APInt(16,val,unsigned) ctor asserts on (isUIntN failed) instead of truncating. Dormant before the LLVM 20 upgrade. Not fixing (would require patching vendored LLVM).

compress.note: Bounded via RTTarget::getImplicitLoopBound (backend shift-loop idiom in compress()/output()). The measured-cost integer __mspabi_* helpers it calls are now costed (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 942057 when those were 0. STILL UNSOUND: __mspabi_slll (32-bit shift) is not in the measured table and stays costed as 0.

crc.note: Context-sensitive call/return matching constraints bound the previously-unbounded inter-procedural cycle (a callee reached from multiple sites had its return edges merged to every landing). Sound: no body-less calls.

dijkstra.note: Linker R_MSP430X_ABS16 reloc truncated: two 100x100 long arrays exceed the 16-bit data address space.

duff.note: Now bounded and SOUND. Duff's device lowers to a multi-entry loop (a switch jump-table branches into the middle of the do-while body), so MachineLoopInfo recognizes no loop and the bound 6 never reached LoopBoundMap. The loop-bound pass now finds the single backedge (LBB0_9->LBB0_2) via a DFS retreating-edge scan, matches the do-while pragma against the loop body, bounds the header, and records the backedge for ProgramGraph to flag -- the existing per-header IPET row then bounds the whole multi-entry SCC (the maximize picks the worst entry). No body-less calls, so sound.

edn.note: Bounded via RTTarget::getImplicitLoopBound (backend shift-loop idiom in jpegdct). The measured-cost __mspabi_mpyi/mpyl it calls are now costed (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 414468 when those were 0. STILL UNSOUND: __mspabi_sral (32-bit shift, not in the measured table) and memcpy stay costed as 0.

expint.note: JSON pragma bound preferred over the loose SCEV maxBTC. Measured-cost integer __mspabi_* helpers now costed (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 145325 when those were 0. STILL UNSOUND: __mspabi_slll (32-bit shift) is not in the measured table and stays costed as 0.

fdct.note: Sound: body-less integer __mspabi_* helpers now costed from measured bounds (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 3359 when costed 0.

fft1.note: opt instcombine fixpoint-verifier abort fixed via instcombine<no-verify-fixpoint> in the Makefile (matches the default -O2 pipeline, which disables fixpoint verification). UNSOUND: double soft-float routines (__mspabi_addd/mpyd/divd/...) are body-less and costed as 0.

fir.note: RAM overflow: in_data[701] + out_data[720] longs exceed MSP430 RAM.

janne_complex.note: Outer while(a<30) bound (11) applied via the MachineLoopBoundAgregatorPass machine-block pragma fallback (inner 9). Sound: b*3 lowers to a body-less __mspabi_mpyi now costed from a measured bound (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 3417 (UNSOUND) when costed 0.

jfdctint.note: Sound: body-less integer __mspabi_* helpers now costed from measured bounds (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 6556 when costed 0.

lms.note: Bounded by the call/return matching constraints. The measured-cost integer __mspabi_* helpers it calls are now costed (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 6436640 when those were 0. STILL UNSOUND: soft-float __mspabi_addd/mpyd/divd/... routines are not measurable (unresolvable indirect call in the soft-float tree) and stay costed as 0.

ludcmp.note: FIXUP binary-grep fixed (grep -a); now fails at a later build step (no .elf produced).

matmult.note: Bounded by the per-call-site call/return matching constraints. Sound: RandomInteger's soft integer mul/div (__mspabi_*) are now costed from measured bounds (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 237371 (UNSOUND) when costed 0.

minver.note: Bounded by the call/return matching constraints. The measured-cost integer __mspabi_* helpers it calls are now costed (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 13531 when those were 0. STILL UNSOUND: soft-double __mspabi_addd/cmpd/divd/mpyd are not measurable and stay costed as 0.

ndes.note: Bounded by the call/return matching constraints. Sound: body-less integer __mspabi_* helpers now costed from measured bounds (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 192334 (UNSOUND) when costed 0.

prime.note: Bounded by the call/return matching constraints (main->prime->divides). Sound: body-less __mspabi_* integer mul/div/mod helpers now costed from measured bounds (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 28753 (UNSOUND) when costed 0.

qurt.note: Bonus: soft-float kernel that shared the multi-call unboundedness; bounded now by the call/return matching constraints. UNSOUND: soft-float __mspabi_* routines body-less, costed as 0.

recursion.note: main computes fib(10); #pragma recursion_bound(177) caps fib's total invocations (C(10)=177), so finalize() bounds the recursive call edges like loop backedges and a finite WCET is produced. The mutual anka/kalle pair is unreachable from main (pruned), so it does not affect the result. Was analyze-fail before recursion bounds existed.

sqrt.note: Added a self-contained main(); the kernel implements its own fabs/sqrtfcn (no external libm), so the WCET is sound.

statemate.note: Was non-deterministic on a start-function ref-count tie; tie now broken (starts from main) -> deterministic. Self-contained, all 302 graph nodes reachable.

ud.note: RAM overflow: long a[50][50] (~10KB) overflows FR5994 RAM.

whet.note: The measured-cost integer __mspabi_* helpers it calls are now costed (ABI_FINDINGS.md); was 30161778 when those were 0. STILL UNSOUND, with an explicit *** UNSOUND *** block listing the remaining body-less calls it under-counts: libm sin/cos/atan/log/exp/sqrt and the soft-double __mspabi_addd/subd/mpyd/divd/fltlid routines, none of which are measurable (MSP430X code LLVM can't decode + a statically unresolvable indirect call in the soft-float tree -- see docs/LibraryCallCosting.md).
